<!--
Thanks for reporting! This is for issues with the MiraDropper INSTALLER.
If the mod itself is buggy AFTER it installed fine (crashes, weird roles, etc)
that's a Town of Us issue, not a MiraDropper one -> https://discord.gg/ugyc4EVUYZ
-->

## What happened?
<!-- Describe the problem in a sentence or two. -->


## Which mode were you using?
- [ ] Install
- [ ] Update
- [ ] Remove

<!-- e.g. "finding my Among Us folder", "downloading", "extracting", "it launched but no TOU:Mira logo" -->

Paste the contents of tou-mira-install-log.txt (it's saved right next to the .bat).
Put it between the ``` marks below so it stays readable.
